properties.label: Historical (mid-20th c. / pre-1980 typical)
properties.proxy_description: Approximate downstream surface flow extent proxy when long-term records at USGS 13132500 (near Arco) and downstream gages showed more frequent positive flow. Based on published NWIS summaries and IDWR/USGS reports (e.g. ~54k AF/yr average at Arco 1944-68). Often reached toward/into the Big Lost River Sinks area in wetter periods.
properties.source: USGS NWIS daily values + statistics (13132500 etc.); IDWR 2024 Groundwater Update; USGS SIR 2021-5078 series. Neutral proxy only — gage presence/absence, not modeled inundation.

properties.label: Recent (2000–present typical)
properties.proxy_description: Approximate downstream surface flow extent proxy based on markedly reduced flow reaching USGS 13132500 (near Arco) and downstream gages in the 2000-present period (~17k AF/yr average at Arco per reports; many years/ seasons with zero or minimal flow at the gage). Flow frequently terminates near or upstream of Arco in available records.
properties.source: USGS NWIS daily values + statistics (13132500 etc.); IDWR 2024 Groundwater Update (Table 1 + text on Arco flows and 2019-2021 seepage events); USGS SIR reports. Neutral proxy only.
